commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3dad4ee70ba53a4edabeb3964ec6660de80addff)
commands.review_summary:
This PR refactors ClawSweeper PR review comments by replacing separate rating/proof sections with a compact Merge readiness block, moving labels/evidence/workflow content into collapsibles, and updating renderer tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows the renderer now emits `_Reviewed ..._` and `Merge readiness`, while the previous-review extractor still parses the old timestamp and section names.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof and a small parser/test fix; do not route this to automated repair while the proof gate is still open.

target.title: fix: Refactor PR review comment layout
target.body:
## Summary
- Compress PR review freshness into the verdict line.
- Replace separate visible PR rating/proof blocks with a compact `Merge readiness` section.
- Move label churn, evidence, rank explanations, workflow notes, and PR surface stats into focused collapsibles.
- Keep proof-blocker guidance visible in `Merge readiness` when proof is missing, mock-only, or insufficient.

## What stayed unchanged
- Proof, rating, label, finding, marker, and sync semantics are unchanged.
- Audit content such as `What I checked` is still rendered, now under `Evidence reviewed`.
- The existing `publicRealBehaviorProofLine` guidance is reused rather than changing proof policy.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: PR review comments are reorganized for faster maintainer scanning without changing ClawSweeper decision semantics, and proof-blocked PRs still show actionable proof guidance in the visible readiness path.
Real environment tested: Local ClawSweeper test/build environment in `/Users/takayukihoffman/github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper-pr-review-comment-ia`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts`; `node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts`; `/Users/takayukihoffman/github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives -D correctness`; `git diff --check`.
Evidence after fix: The focused test file passed with 280 tests and 0 failures, including coverage for compact freshness, `Merge readiness`, proof-blocked strong-patch output, visible proof guidance, label details, evidence details, PR surface placement, rank legend, and workflow details. The proof-blocked renderer now produces this visible shape:

```md
**Merge readiness**
Overall: 🧂 unranked krab
Proof: 🧂 unranked krab
Patch quality: 🦞 diamond lobster
Result: blocked until real behavior proof is added.

Overall follows the weaker of proof and patch quality, so missing proof can cap an otherwise strong patch.

Proof guidance:
Needs real behavior proof before merge: The PR has no real ingestion-run proof yet. After adding proof, update the PR body; ClawSweeper should re-review automatically. If it does not, the PR author or someone with repository write access can comment `@clawsweeper re-review`.
```

Observed result after fix: Generated PR review comments keep the top-level surface concise while preserving label explanations and evidence in collapsibles, and proof-blocked comments retain visible contributor instructions.
What was not tested: Full repository `pnpm run check` was not run because this clean worktree did not have local package-manager tooling installed; focused build, formatting, lint, and test coverage were run instead.

## Verification
- `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `/Users/takayukihoffman/github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives -D correctness`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
